name: create-dapp
description: A turborepo-powered monorepo for @gzkdev/create-dapp, a CLI to scaffold minimal and slightly opinionated DApp starter kits for various blockchain networks.

architecture.packages/cli: The core CLI tool built with Commander, Clack for prompts, and Tsup for bundling.
architecture.packages/cli/templates: Standardized DApp templates for different networks and frameworks (Next.js, Vite).
architecture.tooling: Shared configuration for ESLint, TypeScript, and Prettier managed via workspace:* versions.

guide.development: Run 'pnpm dev' in the root to start turbo in watch mode for the CLI.
guide.adding_template: Add a new directory in 'packages/cli/templates' and update the 'templateOptions' in 'packages/cli/src/cli.ts'.
guide.releasing: Run 'pnpm changeset' to document changes and 'pnpm run release' to publish.
